description: User provides missing address fields; task closes after update confirmed.

task.title: Incomplete address: 900 River Rd
task.body: Property "900 River Rd" is missing one or more address fields (city, state, postal code). Complete the address so leases and documents are accurate.

dialog.content: The property at 900 River Rd is missing city, state, and postal code. This affects lease accuracy and document generation. Can you provide the missing details?
Updated — 900 River Rd, Portland, OR 97201. The property record is now complete. Closing this task.

criteria: Agent specifies which fields are missing rather than a vague request
Agent applies all three fields from a single user response without asking for each separately
Agent confirms the full updated address back to the user before closing
Dialog is concise — resolves in minimal turns
